seoTitle: Belmont South vs Belmore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Belmont South and Belmore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Belmont South vs Belmore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Belmont South and Belmore.
heading: Belmont South vs Belmore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Belmont South, New South Wales and Belmore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Belmore has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Belmont South (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Belmont South or Belmore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Belmont South has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Belmore scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Belmont South scores 65/100 for bushfire risk. Belmore scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Belmont South or Belmore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Belmore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
